_doc: Curated prompt library for the Luby Video Machine audio assets. Each entry produces ONE asset. Re-running the generate script is idempotent: same prompt + same seed = byte-identical output, so existing files are skipped unless --force is passed. Add new entries here to grow the library.
_audio_policy: BGM-only default. SFX generation was tried with AudioLDM2 but the output quality was inconsistent (whoosh/tick/chime came out as noisy or muddy). Cleidson decided to keep BGM only as the standard. If SFX is reintroduced later, sourcing from a curated library (Mixkit, Pixabay) is recommended over generation.

bgm.prompt: upbeat corporate technology background music, modern saas demo, clean synth pads, soft pulsing arpeggio, 110 bpm, optimistic, no lyrics, premium b2b atmosphere
cinematic corporate ambient, slow building tension, deep synth bass, atmospheric pads, subtle electronic percussion, 95 bpm, premium silicon valley product launch feel, no lyrics
confident upbeat tech ambient, smooth electronic groove, warm synth lead, clean four-on-the-floor light kick, modern fintech video soundtrack, 115 bpm, no lyrics
minimal corporate ambient electronic, sparse plucked synth, soft sub bass, ambient pads, restrained percussion, modern infrastructure product video, 100 bpm, no lyrics
energetic upbeat tech corporate, driving electronic rhythm, bright synth lead, building modern saas explainer, 120 bpm, optimistic confident, no lyrics
